characters.name: Alicia
characters.description: AliciaGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanHair colorLight RedEye colorDark AquaPersonal InformationResidenceSpittoon, ArkansasHomeworldEarthFamilySiblingsMaddie Fenton(sister)OthersJack Fenton(brother-in-law)Danny Fenton(nephew)Jazz Fenton(older niece)Dani Fenton(younger niece)Misty Fenton(great-niece)Jackson Fenton(great-nephew)Sam Manson(niece-in-law)Production InformationFirst episodePrisoners of LoveVoiceGrey DeLisle Light Red Dark Aqua Alicia has a very strong sense of independence and self-reliance, but is also strict, short-tempered and tends to shout a lot. characters.name: Amorpho
characters.description: AmorphoGenderMaleSpeciesGhostEye colorRedPersonal InformationOccupationNeutralHomeworldGhost ZoneAmity Park(briefly)AliasesPaulina (briefly)Maurice Foley (briefly)PookyDanny Phantom (briefly)Mr. Lancer (briefly)FriendsDanny PhantomEnemiesDanny Phantom(formerly)Angela and Maurice FoleyDash BaxterMr. LancerPaulinaGoalTo steal the spotlight from Danny Phantom. (formerly)To restore his and Danny's powers. (succeeded)Production InformationFirst episode"Forever Phantom"Last episode"Phantom Planet"VoiceDanny Mann Red Amity Park(briefly) As Amorpho is a ghost without an identity of his own, what he wants more than anything is attention. He is easily made jealous of anyone who gets more attention than him. Amorpho is very sly and loves to pull pranks, but even he has a soft side and can feel guilty if he takes a joke too far.

characters.name: Ancient Ghosts
characters.description: Ancient GhostsGeneral informationNotable membersSeven unnamed AncientsHeadquartersUnknownHomeworldGhost ZonePurposePutting an end to Pariah Dark's reign.EnemiesPariah DarkStatusUnknownProduction informationFirst episodeReign StormLast episodeReign Storm TheAncientswere a group of powerfulghostswho long ago defeated the king of all ghosts,Pariah Dark. It is unknown what happened to them after Pariah's downfall. The Ancients were a group that was said to have existed at the same time as theGhost King. The group took on Pariah Dark in combat and their combined power was enough to defeat him. They then removed theRing of RageandCrown of Firefrom the downed ghost king and placed him in theSarcophagus of Forever Sleep, locking it with theSkeleton Keyin hopes that he would be sealed away forever. They then reduced Pariah's former domain to what would become known asPariah's Keep. The Ancients are nearly silent; they never say a word. They often hide their bodies in long purple robes, through which only their glowing red eyes can be seen. They will do anything to put an end to Pariah’s reign.
characters.personality_section: The Ancients are nearly silent; they never say a word. They often hide their bodies in long purple robes, through which only their glowing red eyes can be seen. They will do anything to put an end to Pariah’s reign.

characters.name: Behemoth
characters.description: BehemothSpeciesGhostPersonal InformationHomeworldGhost ZoneEnemiesVlad PlasmiusProduction InformationFirst episode"The Million Dollar Ghost"Last episode"Phantom Planet"Behemothis a giant monsterghost, and the guard of theSkeleton Key. Behemoth first appeared in "The Million Dollar Ghost." At the beginning of the episode,Vladtried to gain the Skeleton Key, however before he could, Behemoth appeared and the two battled. Vlad managed to gain the upper hand and he and his duplicates ensnared Behemoth. It looked like he was going to win when Behemoth managed to break free and knocked Vlad and his Duplicates back out of theGhost Zone. Vlad got up and the two-faced each other, ready to continue fighting, when Vlad's "Change the Ecto-Filtrator" alarm started going off. Behemoth left, shortly before the portal exploded. At the end of the episode, Vlad returned weakened and injured by accident, and grabbed the key, as he was gloating to himself about his victory Behemoth returned and then ate him, as he was too weak to fight back.

characters.name: Bertrand
characters.description: BertrandTrue formHuman formGenderMaleSpeciesGhostAgeUnknownHair colorGray (Human)None (Ghost)Eye colorGreen (Human)Red (Ghost)Personal InformationHomeworldGhost ZoneFriendsPenelope SpectraEnemiesDanny PhantomProduction InformationFirst episode"My Brother's Keeper"Last episode"Phantom Planet"VoiceJim Ward Gray (Human)None (Ghost) Green (Human)Red (Ghost) Bertrand is very stoic and often sarcastic about the people he meets, but he can be whiny when he is the only man 'out' of the loop. He is very sadistic and every bit as cunningly evil and psychologically aggravating as Penelope Spectra, as they happily attempt to kill many people in order to accomplish their plans. Unlike Spectra, who uses falsely kind words, Bertrand is much more straightforward with his taunts.

characters.name: Box Lunch
characters.description: Box LunchGenderFemaleSpeciesGhostHair colorBlackEye colorRedPersonal InformationHomeworldGhost ZoneFamilyParentsBox Ghost(father)Lunch Lady Ghost(mother)Production InformationFirst episode"The Ultimate Enemy"VoiceKath SoucieBox Lunchis a ghostDannyencounters in "The Ultimate Enemy." She’s the daughter of theBox Ghostand theLunch Lady Ghostfrom the future of an alternate timeline. Black Red Box Lunch combines her parents' personalities. Likeher mother, she will sometimes turn sweet and offer some food, but will quickly turn ferocious. Likeher father, she seems to think she is a bigger threat than she is, and even uses his catchphrase, "Beware!"

characters.description: BulletGenderMaleSpeciesGhostAgeUnknownEye colorRedPersonal InformationAffiliationsGhost Zone Police DepartmentOccupationWalker's second in commandHomeworldGhost ZoneFriendsWalkerEnemiesDanny PhantomProduction InformationFirst episode"Public Enemies"Last episode"Phantom Planet"(no lines)VoiceDaran NorrisBulletisWalker's second in command and the vice-warden ofWalker's Prison. Red Bullet's only main appearance is in "Public Enemies", where he helps Walker take overAmity Parkand pursueWulf. His loyalty towards Walker is questionable, as he activates Wulf's electrical collar without Walker's authorization, yelling, "Walker isn't here!" to one of hisminions.

characters.name: Clockwork
characters.description: ClockworkChildAdultElderGenderMaleSpeciesGhostAgeUnknownEye colorRedPersonal InformationOccupationOverseer of the time streamHomeworldGhost ZoneFriendsDanny PhantomThe Observants(employers)EnemiesDark DannyProduction InformationFirst episode"The Ultimate Enemy"Last episode"Phantom Planet"VoiceDavid Carradine(TV series)Piotr Michael(Nickelodeon All-Star Brawl 2) Red Clockworkis theghostwho’s the master of time. He sees and knows all events that may or may not come to pass. He was voiced by the lateDavid Carradine. As the master of time, Clockwork is a logical ghost who speaks calmly, even under dire situations. Unlike all the other malicious spirits Danny encounters, Clockwork takes a rather neutral role overall to theDanny Phantomworld, thoughDannysees him as more of an ally. His true motives and plans are a mystery due to his unpredictable nature; yet in the end, Clockwork merely means well in his goals and makes sure time flows along a direction that benefits all, even if the Observants disagree with him.

characters.name: Clones of Danny
characters.description: Clones of DannySpeciesHalf-human/Half-ghostPersonal InformationResidenceVlad's chalet (formerly)HomeworldEarthFamilyParentsVlad Plasmius(creator/"father")SiblingsDanny Phantom(genetic template)Production InformationFirst episode"Kindred Spirits"Last episode"Phantom Planet" Theclones ofDannywere created byVladin an attempt to create the perfecthalf-ghostson. All were mindless and eventually melted away exceptDani Phantom. They first appeared in "Kindred Spirits". Vlad wanted the "perfect half-ghost son," but instead he got several failedghostclones and a daughter, Danielle. The failed clones included a bed sheet ghost (revealed to be a half-complete black skeleton with a green glow once uncovered), a tall muscular monster-like ghost, the tiny ghosts who later revealed himself to be a deformed version of Danny, and a prime clone.

characters.name: Cujo
characters.description: Cujo the Ghost DogSmallLargeGenderMaleSpeciesGhostDog (Formerly)AgeUnknownHair colorGreenEye colorRedPersonal InformationAffiliationsAxion LabsOccupationGuard dogHomeworldGhost ZoneAliasesCujoGhost Dog (Wanted Poster)FriendsDanny PhantomEnemiesValerie GrayProduction InformationFirst episode"Shades of Gray"Last episode"D-Stabilized"VoiceS. Scott BullockCujois a small ghostly dog that appears in the episode "Shades of Gray." Though seemingly harmless, he can change from a cute little puppy to an enormous, rabid dog monster. Green Red Cujo's nature is that of an average canine: often barking and playing. However, since he is a ghost dog, he can be very aggressive and ferocious if provoked in any way. Cujo is usually docile in his small form while dangerous when large, though he can be pacified in the latter and be very cheerful. He is also very loyal and can follow given commands, but can still be uncooperative at times and often get into trouble. He has been known to cause large amounts of property destruction, though not out of any ill intent.
characters.personality_section: Cujo's nature is that of an average canine: often barking and playing. Cujo is usually docile in his small form while dangerous when large, though he can be pacified in the latter and be very cheerful. He is also very loyal and can follow given commands, but can still be uncooperative at times and often get into trouble. He has been known to cause large amounts of property destruction, though not out of any ill intent.

characters.description: Cujo the Ghost DogSmallLargeGenderMaleSpeciesGhostDog (Formerly)AgeUnknownHair colorGreenEye colorRedPersonal InformationAffiliationsAxion LabsOccupationGuard dogHomeworldGhost ZoneAliasesCujoGhost Dog (Wanted Poster)FriendsDanny PhantomEnemiesValerie GrayProduction InformationFirst episode"Shades of Gray"Last episode"D-Stabilized"VoiceS. Scott BullockCujois a small ghostly dog that appears in the episode "Shades of Gray." Though seemingly harmless, he can change from a cute little puppy to an enormous, rabid dog monster. Green Red Cujo's nature is that of an average canine: often barking and playing. However, since he is a ghost dog, he can be very aggressive and ferocious if provoked in any way. Cujo is usually docile in his small form while dangerous when large, though he can be pacified in the latter and be very cheerful. He is also very loyal and can follow given commands, but can still be uncooperative at times and often get into trouble. He has been known to cause large amounts of property destruction, though not out of any ill intent.

Scott Bullock White Red Unlike most of the ghosts Danny has fought before, the Dairy King is rather friendly and makes no attempt, much less intends, to harm Danny. Instead, he actually helps Danny by freeing him of his imprisonment.
